# flashblade_array_dns (Data Source)

Reads the current DNS configuration of a FlashBlade array.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_array_dns" "example" {}

output "dns_nameservers" {
  value = data.flashblade_array_dns.example.nameservers
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) The domain suffix appended by the array to unqualified hostnames.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the DNS configuration.
- `nameservers` (List of String) List of DNS server IP addresses.
- `services` (List of String) Services that use this DNS configuration.
- `sources` (List of String) Network interfaces used for DNS traffic.
